title: Why Eval++ Is the Next Great Compute Primitive — Sunil Pai & Matt Carrie, Cloudflare
summary: Cloudflare's Eval++ is a compute primitive that executes LLM-generated code in sandboxed isolates with explicit capability grants. Durable Objects provide the addressable, persistent, stateful compute unit for AI agents with resumable streaming and multi-tab sync. Dynamic Workers enable safe execution of untrusted code through capability-based security rather than ambient access.
